  "findings": [
    "Brinelling of bearing raceways due to mounting force transmitted through the rolling elements",
    "Premature bearing degradation and noise during in-service operation"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the asset immediately to prevent catastrophic shaft or housing damage",
    "Remove the damaged bearing assembly",
    "Install a new bearing using correct mounting tools that apply force only to the press-fitted race"
  ],
  "rationale": "Applying mounting or pressing force through the rolling elements (pressing the wrong race) causes immediate plastic deformation of the raceways (true brinelling). This severe installation error leads to rapid, premature bearing failure during in-service operation.",
  "references": [
    "SKF Bearing Installation and Maintenance Guide",
    "Timken Bearing Damage Analysis Guide"
  ]
}
